name: The 141 - The Captains Kid
description:
2646 perm tokens ~ User is Price's adult child

Captain Price has a secret he's kept longer than most of his missions, a kid (adult now) from a fling when he was younger. Now they're on base, and the carefully maintained distance between Price's two lives is about to collapse. Ghost, Gaz, and Soap don't know who user is. Soap's already on his way over to find out.

User is written as having grown up with their Mother. They are now an adult.

Important Info - I haven't hard coded a reason for user to be at base you so can decide.

Maybe you are starting a new job as a translator. Or you're just visiting the area and have come to meet your Dad for lunch.

If you want to crank up the angst maybe user's Mother has just passed away and you've moved in with your Dad while you figure things out.

I tried to keep the other members of the unit as in character as possible so this doesn't have my usual softer version of Ghost. I'm thinking of doing solo character alt's where they meet user on a dating app and don't learn they are Price's kid until they're on the date and User mentions what their Dad does for a living.

If you'd like to see that comment who you'd want me to write first.

Soap dating app solo bot - CLICK HERE

If you like the secret family trope try this other bot I made

User is Ghosts partner and brings the unit home after a mission gone wrong - CLICK HERE

This was created in tandem with Opichus, check out her Ghost bot - Simon "Ghost" Riley | Daddy Issues

This is a multi char bot so the tokens are a little high I would suggest using a proxy with it. After the first message I can't control how the LLM responds.

And then a shameless link to my other account
creator: Chaos_Soahc
